nodes.name: stca-action
nodes.summary: Composite GitHub Action that installs STCA, runs static analysis on PRs, checks for blocking severities, and uploads SARIF results to GitHub Code Scanning.

nodes.name: stca-workflow
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs STCA on pull requests (diff-only) and pushes (full scan), uploads SARIF, and fails the build on critical findings.

nodes.name: custom-semgrep-rules
nodes.summary: Example custom Semgrep rules demonstrating how to extend STCA with user-defined patterns for Python (secret leakage, SQL injection, hardcoded passwords).

nodes.name: sample-stca-config
nodes.summary: Example STCA pipeline configuration showing layer toggles, critical/concurrency paths, block/warn severity levels, LLM settings, and output directories.

nodes.name: pyproject
nodes.summary: Python project configuration defining package metadata (stca-pipeline v0.1.0), dependencies (tree-sitter, numpy, scikit-fuzzy), optional extras (LLM, fuzz, mutation, property), CLI entry point, and pytest settings.

nodes.name: README
nodes.summary: Project documentation covering STCA Pipeline's architecture (15 analysis layers + 6 detection engines + IT2-FIS aggregation brain), CLI commands, CPG queries, typestate analysis, metamorphic/differential testing, LLM-as-oracle, detection depth comparison with commercial tools, quick start guide, and honest limits.

nodes.name: worklog
nodes.summary: Development worklog documenting P0/P1 follow-up fixes: nullness analyzer bug fix (bare function calls), silent error swallowing audit across 25 files (44 patterns replaced with logged warnings), scanner health tracking system, and CLI flags (--strict-scanners, --verbose).

nodes.name: entry-points
nodes.summary: Package entry points registering the `stca` console script pointing to stca.cli:main.

nodes.name: requires
nodes.summary: Auto-generated dependency list for the stca-pipeline package including core deps (click, rich, pyyaml, tree-sitter, numpy, scikit-fuzzy) and optional extras.

nodes.name: sources
nodes.summary: Auto-generated manifest of all source files included in the stca-pipeline package distribution.

nodes.name: top-level
nodes.summary: Auto-generated top-level package name (stca) for the installed distribution.

nodes.name: dependency-links
nodes.summary: Empty dependency links file (no external package repositories configured).

nodes.name: cpp-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for C/C++ security: 12 rules covering buffer overflows (gets, strcpy, sprintf), command injection (system), use-after-free, format string attacks, unchecked malloc, and raw pointer misuse.

nodes.name: detekt-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from detekt (Kotlin linter) to Python: covers complexity rules (complex conditions, long methods, too many parameters), style rules (return count, naming), and potential-bugs patterns adapted from Kotlin to Python.

nodes.name: go-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Go security: 12 rules covering shell injection (exec.Command), SQL injection (fmt.Sprintf), TLS bypass (InsecureSkipVerify), broken crypto (MD5/SHA1), hardcoded secrets, insecure randomness (math/rand), path traversal, defer-in-loop, error shadowing, and swallowed errors.

nodes.name: java-frameworks
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Java framework security: covers Spring (CSRF disabled, permitAll, actuator exposure, RequestMapping without auth), Hibernate (HQL injection, N+1 queries, lazy loading), and JPA (open-in-view) patterns.

nodes.name: java-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Java security: 12 rules covering command injection (Runtime.exec, ProcessBuilder), SQL injection, XXE, unsafe deserialization (ObjectInputStream), broken crypto (MD5/SHA1), trust-all certs, hardcoded passwords, printStackTrace leaks, busy-wait, and empty catch blocks.

nodes.name: javascript-frameworks
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for JavaScript/TypeScript framework security: covers Express.js (helmet, CORS wildcard, CSRF, body parser limits), React (dangerouslySetInnerHTML, prop drilling), Next.js (getServerSideProps SSR issues, API routes), and NestJS patterns.

nodes.name: javascript-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for JavaScript/TypeScript security: 21 rules covering injection (eval, new Function, child_process.exec), XSS (innerHTML, document.write, dangerouslySetInnerHTML), prototype pollution, TLS bypass, hardcoded secrets, JWT bypass, path traversal, SQL injection, ReDoS, info disclosure, and performance bugs.

nodes.name: lintr-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from lintr (R linter) to Python: covers assignment operators, brace spacing, operator spacing, quotes, semicolons, line length, indentation, naming conventions, deprecated patterns, and function complexity.

nodes.name: luacheck-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from luacheck (Lua linter) to Python: covers undefined globals, global access in functions, read-only violations (builtin modification), unused variables, recursive calls, redefined variables, and variable shadowing.

nodes.name: python-frameworks
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Python framework security: covers Django (raw SQL, debug mode, ALLOWED_HOSTS, CSRF, SQL injection in ORM), Flask (debug mode, Markup XSS, secret key in source), and FastAPI (dependency injection, middleware) patterns.

nodes.name: python-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Python security: 25 rules covering injection (eval, exec, subprocess shell=True, os.system), SQL injection (f-string, string concat, %), deserialization (pickle, yaml.load, JWT), auth (hardcoded passwords/secrets, broken crypto), SSRF, path traversal, XSS (Flask Markup, Django mark_safe), info disclosure, race conditions, and business logic antipatterns.

nodes.name: react-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for React/JavaScript application security: 30 rules addressing specific audit findings including JWT in localStorage (CWE-922), JSX template XSS, dangerouslySetInnerHTML, AES-ECB mode, hardcoded encryption keys, window.open without noopener, test URLs in production, hardcoded UUIDs, missing CSP, console.log sensitive data, CORS wildcard, missing auth guards, privilege escalation via default-allow, and more.

nodes.name: spotbugs-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from SpotBugs (Java linter) to Python: covers bad practice (__eq__ without __hash__, finalize without super), correctness (empty except, bare except), malicious code (mutable default args), multi-threading (GIL, race conditions), performance (unnecessary list comprehension), and security patterns.
